notes: Manual resolutions for calculator edge cases. Tradable pets use current public base values from AdoptMeTradingValues on April 9, 2026 and derive potion, Neon, and Mega lanes with the calculator's legacy scaling when explicit variant ladders are unavailable. Temporary or non-tradable pets are forced to zero so they do not distort trade results.
